The SAVE Act is sparking major debate across the country!
Is this about protecting election integrity… or restricting voter access? 

Here's a way to get your voice heard: Record or text your political take for my Straight Shooter Show every Wednesday at 6pm -8pm EST! bit.ly/4sSoDQ4

posts.text: [VIDEO: Stephen A. STUNNED After Congressman Kevin Kiley Reveals Why He LEFT Republicans] Straight shooter with Stephen A. >> I am writing to inform you that Representative Kevin Kylie has resigned as a member of the House Republican Conference. Signed sincerely, Lisa Mlan, Chairwoman, House Republican Conference. The Honorable Tim Wahlberg. Dear Mr. Chairman, this letter is to advise you that Representative Kevin Kylie's election to the Committee on Education and Workforce has been automatically vacated pursuant to clause 5B of rule 10 effective today. Signed sincerely, Mike Johnson, Speaker of the House of Representatives, the Honorable Sam Graves. Dear Mr. Chairman, this letter is to advise you that Representative Kevin Kylie's election to the Committee on Transportation and Infrastructure has been automatically vacated pursuant to clause 5B of rule 10 effective today.
